landing.title: DermaConsent
landing.heroTitle: Privacy-first digital consent for dermatology practices
landing.heroSubtitle: Zero-knowledge encrypted. DSGVO compliant. Send your first consent link in under 2 minutes.
landing.problemTitle: Built to solve real practice problems
landing.problemSubtitle: The challenges every dermatology practice faces with consent management — solved.
landing.problem1Desc: Hours wasted printing, filing, and searching paper forms. Compliance risks with every missing signature.
landing.problem1Solution: Digital forms with one-click link generation
landing.problem2Desc: Before/after photos on phones, USB drives, and shared folders — without proper consent tracking.
landing.problem2Solution: Encrypted photo storage with consent trail
landing.problem3Desc: Patient data in plain text, unsure if your process would survive a data protection audit.
landing.problem3Solution: Zero-knowledge encryption — we never see patient data
landing.featuresSubtitle: Purpose-built for dermatology and aesthetic medicine with industry-leading security.
landing.feature1Desc: Six treatment-specific forms — Botox, Filler, Laser, Chemical Peel, Microneedling, PRP. Generate a consent link in one click, patients sign on any device.
landing.feature2Desc: RSA-4096 + AES-256-GCM hybrid encryption. Patient data is encrypted in your browser before reaching our servers. We cannot read it. Ever.
landing.feature3Desc: Before/after photos encrypted client-side, tagged by body region, with comparison view.
landing.feature4Desc: Anatomical diagrams with injection points, product tracking, and batch numbers.
landing.feature5Desc: Consent forms in 8 languages. Patients see forms in their preferred language.
landing.feature6Desc: Consent conversion rates, revenue tracking, and complete GDPR audit trail.
landing.securityTitle: We cannot see your patient data. Ever.
landing.securityDesc: All patient data is encrypted in your browser before it reaches our servers. Your master password never leaves your device. Even if our database were breached, attackers would get only encrypted noise.
landing.securityFeature1Desc: RSA-4096 + AES-256-GCM hybrid encryption happens entirely in your browser.
landing.securityFeature2Desc: Your master password never leaves your device. We have no ability to decrypt your data.
landing.securityFeature3Desc: Built for German data protection law. Complete audit trail for every action.
landing.pricingSubtitle: 30-day free trial on every plan. No credit card required.
landing.starterDesc: For small practices getting started with digital consent.
landing.professionalDesc: For growing practices that need unlimited capacity.
landing.enterpriseDesc: For practice groups and clinics with advanced needs.
landing.pricingNote: All plans include zero-knowledge encryption, DSGVO compliance, and 30-day free trial. Prices exclude VAT.
landing.ctaDesc: Join dermatology practices across Germany that trust DermaConsent for secure, DSGVO-compliant consent management.
landing.ctaNote: 30-day free trial · No credit card required · Setup in minutes
landing.footerDesc: Privacy-first digital consent management for dermatology practices. Zero-knowledge encrypted. Made in Germany.
landing.aiSubtitle: AI that helps your practice work smarter — from patient communication to treatment insights.
landing.ai1Desc: AI generates plain-language explanations of consent forms in 8 languages, with text-to-speech for patients.
landing.ai2Desc: AI analyzes consent metrics and generates actionable business insights — conversion trends, bottlenecks, opportunities.
landing.ai3Desc: Personalized post-treatment care instructions generated for each patient and procedure type.
landing.ai4Desc: AI-drafted patient messages for appointment reminders, follow-ups, and treatment updates.

consent.notFoundOrExpired: Consent form not found or expired.
consent.revokedMessage: This consent has been revoked and is no longer valid.
consent.expiredMessage: This consent link has expired and is no longer valid.

consent.signatureInstruction: By signing below, you confirm that you have read and understood the information provided, and you consent to the procedure.
consent.legalNotice: By submitting you confirm that you have read and understood the consent declaration. Your data will be transmitted and stored encrypted (GDPR-compliant).

consent.explainerTitle: What does this consent form mean?
consent.explainerSubtitle: AI-generated plain-language explanation of your procedure.

consent.personalIntro: Let's start with your details. This information helps your doctor identify your records.
consent.formIntro: Please answer the following questions about your health. This helps ensure your safety during the procedure.
consent.signatureHint: Use your finger on mobile or mouse on desktop
consent.reviewSubtitle: Please verify everything is correct before submitting.
consent.successNextDetail: Your consent has been securely submitted and encrypted. Your practice will store a signed PDF.
consent.successClose: You may now close this window.

decryptedViewer.title: Decrypted data
decryptedViewer.description: This data was decrypted client-side and does not leave your browser.

onboarding.welcomeDescription: Your zero-knowledge encrypted consent management platform. Let's get you started in just a few steps.
onboarding.vaultDescription: All patient data is encrypted with your master password. The vault panel on the dashboard lets you unlock decryption. We never have access to your data.
onboarding.firstConsentDescription: Click below to create your first consent form. You'll choose a treatment type, and we'll generate a secure link you can send to your patient.

twoFactor.enabledDescription: Two-factor authentication is enabled for your account.
twoFactor.disabledDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account with a TOTP authenticator app.
twoFactor.setupError: Failed to set up 2FA. Please try again.

quiz.title: Comprehension Check
quiz.description: Please answer the following questions to confirm you understand the procedure and its risks.
quiz.incorrectFeedback: That's not quite right, but you may continue. Your physician will review your responses.
quiz.botoxDuration: What is the expected duration of Botox results?
quiz.botoxSideEffect: Which is a common side effect of Botox?
quiz.botoxSideEffectB: Temporary bruising at the injection site
quiz.botoxReversible: Can Botox effects be immediately reversed?
quiz.botoxReversibleB: No, effects wear off naturally over time
quiz.fillerDuration: How long do dermal filler results typically last?
quiz.fillerRisk: What is an important risk to be aware of with filler injections?
quiz.fillerReversible: Can hyaluronic acid filler be dissolved if needed?
quiz.laserAftercare: What is the most important aftercare instruction after laser treatment?
quiz.laserAftercareA: Avoid sun exposure and use sunscreen
quiz.laserSideEffect: Which is a common temporary side effect of laser treatment?
quiz.peelAftercare: What should you avoid after a chemical peel?
quiz.peelAftercareC: Picking or peeling skin and sun exposure
quiz.peelSideEffect: Which is a normal reaction after a chemical peel?
quiz.peelSideEffectA: Skin redness and peeling for several days
quiz.microDowntime: What is the typical downtime after microneedling?
quiz.microDowntimeB: 1–3 days of redness, similar to a mild sunburn
quiz.microContraindication: Which condition is a contraindication for microneedling?
quiz.microContraindicationA: Active skin infections or open wounds
quiz.prpSource: Where does PRP (Platelet-Rich Plasma) come from?
quiz.prpSourceB: Your own blood, processed to concentrate platelets
quiz.prpSourceC: Donor blood from a blood bank
quiz.prpSessions: How many PRP sessions are typically needed for best results?

premiumGate.communicationsDescription: Draft professional, multilingual patient messages in seconds — appointment reminders, consent follow-ups, and post-treatment instructions.
premiumGate.aftercareDescription: Generate personalised aftercare instructions for your patients based on treatment type and body region. Available on the Professional plan.
premiumGate.analyticsInsightsDescription: Unlock AI-generated analysis of your practice data — trends, conversion insights, and actionable recommendations.
